title: Advanced Classroom Furniture
description: Desks and chairs that you can knock around and move - experimental physics mod
body:
# Advanced Classroom Furniture
### Made for ModFest 26

This mod adds rigid-body physics based furniture props themed around the classroom.

Included are classroom desks of all wood types, and corresponding chairs.
Interact with the desks and chairs by punching them to knock them around and make them fall over, or by right-clicking to sit in them.

![Furniture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2B2ITxoC/images/0de1607a3c4204616cdd31f3a942e0bbe8e6676d.png)

You can also manipulate furniture with one of three special items:
- Furniture Dismantling Hammer: Attack a piece of furniture to destroy it.
- Furniture Grabbing Hand: Hold attack on a piece of furniture and drag it around to move it in the air. While dragging, also hold the interact button to rotate the furniture.
- Furniture Gluing Hand: Functions like the grabbing hand, but upon releasing the piece of furniture, it will glue itself to any other furniture pieces it is touching.

All items are only accessible in creative mode. The physics engine is unfinished and not stable/optimized. This mod is primarily a technical test.
